summary: Prevent Cost Consulting department-owner submissions from flowing backwards to subordinate reviewers and improve application loading performance.

notes: Cost Consulting department-owner submissions bypass the source-side project-owner and department-owner stages.
Consulting-only submissions complete without an approval task; PMCC project blocks continue through their applicable PM-side stages.
Running approval graphs are repaired so obsolete source-side pending tasks are skipped and downstream collaboration stages resume.
Approval-chain views omit source-side stages bypassed because the submitter is the department owner.
Page modules are loaded on demand and shared bootstrap requests are deduplicated to improve initial and cross-page loading.
Realtime invalidation is coalesced to reduce redundant refreshes while preserving current data.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.19.2.
Run scripts/assert-cc-department-owner-submission-routing.sql against the migrated production database in a rollback transaction.
Confirm timesheet 206 no longer has Cost Consulting source-side pending tasks and retains PM-side pending tasks.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.19.2.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.19.2.
